MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS EQUITY ONE, INC. AND FULL SERVICE MAINTENANCE, INC.'S Motion Seeking Leave To File The Cross Complaint is off calendar as a duplicate entry. (302/EHG)

Defts' Motion Seeking Leave Of Court To File Its Cross-Complaint
Off Calendar Feb-11-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Defendants' Motion Seeking Leave Of Court To File Its Cross-Complaint is granted to prevent a multiplicity of actions. Defendants have not been dilatory in bringing this motion. The deposition testimony of Juan Benavides in October of 2014 indicates that the security companies perhaps assumed a duty to locate hazards on the property. A slight trial continuance will not unduly prejudice plaintiff. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Dawn Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
